name: egg sandwich
ingredients: egg; tost; cheese; salt; black pepper
instructions: break the egg into the ban; add salt on the egg; add cheese on the tost; add the egg on the tost

name: pasta
ingredients: pasta; water; milk; cheese; tomato paste; oil; salt; broccoli; carrot
instructions: boil the pasta on the water; in another pan mix the other ingredients together; add the pasta on the mixture

name: machboose
instructions: boil chicken with water and spices; boil the rise in the water; mix everything

name: chia seed boding
ingredients: chia seeds; milk; mango; yogurt; blueberry; nuts; rose water; saffron
instructions: add chia seed to milk and yogurt; cut the fruits; crush nuts; add the rose water and saffron to the milk; mix everything and keep in the fridge min 120 min

name: cesser salad
ingredients: lettuce; Parmesan cheese; Caesar dressing; Grilled chicken
instructions: Wash and chop the lettuce; add parmesan; Pour in the Caesar dressing; toss well; Top with grilled chicken

name: Pancakes
ingredients: flour; egg; milk; sugar; baking powder; oil; syrup
instructions: mix all ingredients; Heat a lightly greased pan; pour the batter into the pan; cook until bubbles appear then flip; serve with syrup
